criteria: The agent has read section 3, Figure 1, and Algorithm 1 completely to understand the core methodology of using graph structure learning for molecular property prediction.
The Graph Isomorphism Network is planned as described in section 3.2.1 to extract node embeddings.
The Graph Pooling is planned as described in section 3.2.2 to obtain molecular embeddings.
The calculation of Extended Connectivity Fingerprints (ECFP) is planned to construct the adjacency matrix.
The structure learning is planned as described in section 3.4 to learn the adjacency matrices and GNN layers.
The GSL-specific loss and it combination with task prediction loss are planned as described in section 3.5
The code for the Graph Isomorphism Network has been implemented as described in section 3.2.1 to extract node embeddings.
